message:
You toss the squeaky toy, your dog grabs it and WHIPS it side to side like it owes them money. 🐶🧸 Adorable… and ancient. That violent little shake is a leftover hunting instinct: out in the wild, a fast grab-and-shake is how their wolf ancestors finished off prey in one swift motion. Your couch-loving goofball has no rabbits to chase, so all that built-in predator drive comes pouring out on the poor stuffed squirrel instead. Fun fact — terriers are usually the most dramatic shakers of all! 🐾

Comment your dog's #1 victim toy! 🧸
